# @unisonlabs/code-chunk

> AST-aware code chunking for semantic retrieval into the Unison brain. Splits
> source code at function/class/method boundaries using tree-sitter, enriches
> each chunk with scope, imports, and sibling context, then pushes them as
> searchable documents into your Unison brain workspace.

**Agents: start with [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** — it self-onboards you onto this
library (install → auth → chunk → ingest → verify), then the chunk-and-search loop.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): install, quickstart, all options, API reference
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an agent installs, authenticates, and uses this client
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): build, test, lint, PR workflow
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): how to report vulnerabilities

## Usage
- Chunk a file: `import { chunk } from '@unisonlabs/code-chunk'`
- Ingest into brain: `import { ingestFile } from '@unisonlabs/code-chunk'`
- Batch ingest: `import { ingestBatch } from '@unisonlabs/code-chunk'`
- Direct client: `import { BrainClient } from '@unisonlabs/code-chunk'`

## Examples
- [README.md#quickstart](README.md#quickstart): copy-pasteable examples for chunking, ingest, batch, streaming
- [README.md#api-reference](README.md#api-reference): full option tables and return types
